title: Vance Criticizes Kyiv and Moscow for 'Haggling Over a Few Square Kilometres' as Peace Talks Stall
detail: US Vice President JD Vance publicly criticized both Ukraine and Russia for 'haggling over a few square kilometres' as ceasefire negotiations remain deadlocked, signaling growing frustration in Washington with the pace of peace talks. The remarks reflect a shift in US messaging, pressuring both sides equally and underscoring the Trump administration's impatience with the stalled diplomatic process.

title: Putin Announces Orthodox Easter Ceasefire, Expects Zelensky to Reciprocate
detail: Russian President Vladimir Putin announced a unilateral Orthodox Easter ceasefire in Ukraine, stating he expects President Zelensky to reciprocate the gesture. The announcement marks a significant diplomatic development as formal peace talks between Russia and Ukraine remain stalled. Orthodox Easter falls on April 20, 2026. The ceasefire offer comes amid continued frontline fighting and ongoing international pressure — including from the Trump administration — to reach a negotiated settlement. Ukraine's response to the offer was not immediately confirmed.
